sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - NYINC Signature Sale 3130, Lot 36074 — Ancients
Gaius (Caligula) (AD 37-41), with Agrippina Senior. AR denarius (18mm, 3.85 gm, 8h). NGC Choice XF 4/5 - 2/5, brushed, scuffs. Lugdunum, ca. AD 37-38. C•CAESAR•AVG•GERM•P•M•TR•POT, bare head
sales.description:
Ancients
Gaius (Caligula) (AD 37-41), with Agrippina Senior. AR denarius (18mm, 3.85 gm, 8h). NGC Choice XF 4/5 - 2/5, brushed, scuffs. Lugdunum, ca. AD 37-38. C•CAESAR•AVG•GERM•P•M•TR•POT, bare head of Caligula right / AGRIPPINA•MAT•C•CAES•AVG•GERM, draped bust of Agrippina Senior right, seen from front, hair arranged in ringlets along brow line and gathered into looped plait at back. RIC I 8. 

Most ancient historians agree Agrippina Senior, the granddaughter of Augustus, was a model of rect...

sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - Dallas Signature Sale 3126, Lot 31031 — Ancients
Gaius (Caligula) (AD 37-41). AR denarius (19mm, 3.53 gm, 4h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5. Rome, AD 37-38. C CAESAR•AVG•GERM•P•M•TR•POT, laureate head of Caligula right / GERMANICVS•CAES•P•C•CAES
sales.description:
Ancients
Gaius (Caligula) (AD 37-41). AR denarius (19mm, 3.53 gm, 4h). NGC Choice XF 5/5 - 4/5. Rome, AD 37-38. C CAESAR•AVG•GERM•P•M•TR•POT, laureate head of Caligula right / GERMANICVS•CAES•P•C•CAES•AVG•GERM, bare head of Germanicus right. RIC I 18. Gunmetal toning and a firm strike accent the devices.

Ex Dr. Patrick Tan Collection (Goldberg, Auction 98, 6 June 2017), lot 2229; Nomos, Auction 11 (9 October 2015), lot 164.

Germanicus, the father of Gaius, was the John F. Kennedy of his gene...
